question_intent: Find the full name of the conference in which the player with the most points in the 2000 season played

plan.question_intent: Find the full name of the conference in which the player with the most points in the 2000 season played
plan.detail_query: SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.pts, s.tmid, a.fullname AS conf_fullname FROM master m JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code WHERE s.year = 2000 AND a.type = 'Conference' ORDER BY s.pts DESC LIMIT 1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.pts, s.tmid, t.confid
join_clauses: JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year
blocks.notes: Player names, points, team ID, and conference ID for the 2000 season

blocks.name: root
blocks.from_clause: FROM (SELECT leaf_1.firstname, leaf_1.lastname, leaf_1.pts, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.confid FROM {{leaf_1}} AS leaf_1 ORDER BY leaf_1.pts DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1
join_clauses: JOIN {{leaf_2}} AS leaf_2 ON leaf_1.confid = leaf_2.code
blocks.notes: Full name of the conference where the player with the most points in the 2000 season played

steps.clause: JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (s.year = 2000)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (s.year = 2001)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (s.year = 2000)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (s.year = 1999)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (s.year = 2000)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (s.year >= 1912)
LIMIT 5

SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.pts, s.tmid, t.confid
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (s.year >= 1912)

SELECT *
FROM abbrev a
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference')
LIMIT 5

SELECT a.code, a.fullname
FROM abbrev a
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference')

build_logs.notes: Full name of the conference where the player with the most points in the 2000 season played

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT leaf_1.firstname, leaf_1.lastname, leaf_1.pts, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.confid FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.pts, s.tmid, t.confid
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (s.year >= 1912)) AS leaf_1 ORDER BY leaf_1.pts DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN {{leaf_2}} AS leaf_2 ON leaf_1.confid = leaf_2.code
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT leaf_1.firstname, leaf_1.lastname, leaf_1.pts, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.confid FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.pts, s.tmid, t.confid
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (s.year >= 1912)) AS leaf_1 ORDER BY leaf_1.pts DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1
JOIN (SELECT a.code, a.fullname
FROM abbrev a
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference')) AS leaf_2 ON leaf_1.confid = leaf_2.code
LIMIT 5

SELECT leaf_2.fullname
FROM (SELECT leaf_1.firstname, leaf_1.lastname, leaf_1.pts, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.confid FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.pts, s.tmid, t.confid
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (s.year >= 1912)) AS leaf_1 ORDER BY leaf_1.pts DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1
JOIN (SELECT a.code, a.fullname
FROM abbrev a
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference')) AS leaf_2 ON leaf_1.confid = leaf_2.code

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.g) AS total_goals
FROM (SELECT m.playerid, s.year, s.g
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname IN ('Campbell Conference', 'Wales Conference'))) AS leaf_1

question: What is the full name of the conference for the player with the highest total points scored since 1912?
